title: Unauthorized error when sending credentials to Xano
symptom: When sending a request to a Xano endpoint with credentials checked, the user receives an 'Error code 401'. This indicates that the authorization is not being accepted.
not_this_if: Authorization is not required by the endpoint
root_cause: The error occurs because the authorization token is not being sent correctly. The API expects the token to be passed under the key 'Authorization', and if it is sent under a different key or not at all, the request will fail with a 401 error.
fix_steps: Open the workflow settings in WeWeb
Locate the field where the auth token is being passed
Change the key to 'Authorization' as per Xano's documentation
Save the changes and test the request again
agent_instruction: Ensure the auth token is passed under the key 'Authorization' in the workflow settings.
